sections.paragraph:
παρεμβολή, ῆς, ἡ [παρεμβάλλω] ‘spatial or structural arrangement for a group of people engaged in military or related activity’

—a. w. focus on non-urban feature, camp, of temporary fortified place for Israelites on their march Hb 13:11, 13; in imagery, of the Messianic community Rv 20:9.

—b. specifically, barracks of Roman troops Ac 21:34, 37; 22:24; 23:10, 16, 32; 28:16 v.l.

—c. by ext., military forces in battle array army Hb 11:34.
